title: SolarScorch: Solar Geometry and Alignment Studies in Leonardo da Vinci's Codex Atlanticus
description: Solar geometry and alignment study of Codex Atlanticus CA673. Identifies a 156.4 degree shadow bearing anomaly and proposes that Leonardo embedded systematic solar observation into his codex practice.

creators.name: Vallance, Richard Steven
creators.affiliation: The People Focused Group, Doncaster, UK

notes: Pre-publication draft. DOI pending explicit release instruction from Richard Steven Vallance.
